developer_response.body:
Hi TgmGG, thanks for your honest review and for giving Monke Monke a fair rating! We appreciate that you enjoy the core gameplay, and we also hear your concerns loud and clear.

Movement + MonkeUp Colliders: We’re actively working on the hitboxes related to MonkeUp to avoid movement issues. Your input helps us pinpoint where things need work.

Thanks again for playing and taking the time to share your thoughts. We’re committed to improving Monke Monke with every update. If you have more suggestions or need help with anything, feel free to reach out on our Discord!

reviews.review_description: I have played this game since the beginning and I have had no complaints it has some of the best community every nice and will be willing to help and work with everyone and has  many activities  that have a lot of people which makes such a good game also including the creativity in the updates if your looking forward good and long lasting memorable replay able game I highly recommend this game

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, jbarnacle1! It means the world to hear from someone who's been with us since the beginning. We're so glad you've enjoyed the community, updates, and everything Monke Monke has to offer. Your support keeps us going, and we’re committed to making the game even more memorable for everyone.

reviews.review_description: Owner never cusses at people there’s a bunch of staff on and best game ever if you’re ban from gorilla tag

reviews.review_title: The worst fan game I've ever played.
reviews.review_description: This game deserves 0 stars, and for so many reasons. One, name computer doesn't work. I mean, don't even try to change your name. The keyboard is as glitched as hell. Two, it's so easy to fall out of the map. Plus, there's no respawn or kick barrier, so your just falling forever. Three, literally nobody is online. I only saw one person, boring as hell! Four, cosmetics don't even work. If you try to put one on, it doesn't show up! I could go on for hours on how bad this game is. Honestly, worst fan game I've ever played. Don't waste your time.

developer_response.body:
Hi Spongiboy74, thanks for taking the time to leave a review — even if it’s a tough one to read. We're sorry you had a frustrating experience. We're actively working on improving the game, and feedback like yours helps us identify key issues.

Player Count: We’re a small but growing community. We’re doing our best to boost player engagement through events and updates — and we welcome everyone who joins!

We’d love to hear more about your experience and see how we can turn it around. You can always reach out via our official Discord or support email. Thanks again for the feedback!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, TBBB_Ezra! We're really glad you're enjoying the horror mode and the variety of game modes — that means a lot to us. We've got more updates on the way, so stay tuned! Thanks for being part of the Monke Monke community !

developer_response.body: Thank you, NomVL2! We’re so glad you’re enjoying the unique lore and game modes in Monke Monke — we’ve worked hard to make sure it offers something special! Your feedback means a lot, and we can’t wait to bring even more exciting updates and content your way. Stay tuned for more adventures!

developer_response.body:
Hi Reubyn11, we’re sorry to hear you had a poor experience, but we’d like to address your concerns. We’re aware of some lag issues, and we’re actively working on optimizing performance in upcoming updates.

As for the moderation concerns, we take any abuse seriously, and our moderators follow strict guidelines. If you’ve experienced issues with moderation, please reach out to us via Discord or support so we can look into it directly. Thanks for your feedback!
